languages.text: If an enemy dodged, parried or blocked your attack, your next attack against them can't be dodged, parried or blocked and deals +{uip|Damage|d631acbb9e10424c88f2974f7c075207} base damage.

traits.locale_text: If an enemy dodged, parried or blocked your attack, your next attack against them can't be dodged, parried or blocked and deals +{uip|Damage|d631acbb9e10424c88f2974f7c075207} base damage.

traits.locale_text: If an enemy dodges, parries, or blocks the user's attack, the user's next attack against that enemy cannot be dodged, parried, or blocked and deals +{uip|Damage|d631acbb9e10424c88f2974f7c075207} base damage.

If an enemy {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parries{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}blocks{/g} the user's attack, the user's next attack against that enemy cannot be dodged, parried, or blocked and deals +{uip|Damage|d631acbb9e10424c88f2974f7c075207} base damage.

If an enemy dodges, parries, or blocks the user's attack, the user's next attack against that enemy cannot be dodged, parried, or blocked and deals +{uip|Damage|d631acbb9e10424c88f2974f7c075207} base damage.

If an enemy {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parries{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}blocks{/g} the user's attack, the user's next attack against that enemy cannot be dodged, parried, or blocked and deals +{uip|Damage|d631acbb9e10424c88f2974f7c075207} base damage.

languages.text: Если противник с помощью {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклонения{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}парирования{/g} или {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}блока{/g} избегает атаки персонажа, следующая его атака против этого противника наносит +{uip|Damage|d631acbb9e10424c88f2974f7c075207} базового урона, при этом ее нельзя избежать этими способами.
languages.original_text: If an enemy {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parries{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}blocks{/g} the user's attack, the user's next attack against that enemy cannot be dodged, parried, or blocked and deals +{uip|Damage|d631acbb9e10424c88f2974f7c075207} base damage.

traits.locale_text: Если противник с помощью {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклонения{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}парирования{/g} или {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}блока{/g} избегает атаки персонажа, следующая его атака против этого противника наносит +{uip|Damage|d631acbb9e10424c88f2974f7c075207} базового урона, при этом ее нельзя избежать этими способами.

Если противник с помощью {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклонения{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}парирования{/g} или {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}блока{/g} избегает атаки персонажа, следующая его атака против этого противника наносит +{uip|Damage|d631acbb9e10424c88f2974f7c075207} базового урона, при этом ее нельзя избежать этими способами.

languages.text: Si un enemigo {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquiva{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}para{/g} o {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}bloquea{/g} el ataque del usuario, el siguiente ataque del usuario contra el objetivo no se puede esquivar, parar ni bloquear e inflige +{uip|Damage|d631acbb9e10424c88f2974f7c075207} de daño básico.
languages.original_text: If an enemy {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parries{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}blocks{/g} the user's attack, the user's next attack against that enemy cannot be dodged, parried, or blocked and deals +{uip|Damage|d631acbb9e10424c88f2974f7c075207} base damage.

traits.locale_text: Si un enemigo {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquiva{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}para{/g} o {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}bloquea{/g} el ataque del usuario, el siguiente ataque del usuario contra el objetivo no se puede esquivar, parar ni bloquear e inflige +{uip|Damage|d631acbb9e10424c88f2974f7c075207} de daño básico.

languages.text: Wenn ein Gegner dem Angriff des Nutzers {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}ausweicht{/g}, ihn {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}pariert{/g} oder {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}blockt{/g}, kann der nächste Angriff des Nutzers auf diesen Gegner nicht pariert oder geblockt und ihm kann nicht ausgewichen werden. Ferner verursacht er +{uip|Damage|d631acbb9e10424c88f2974f7c075207} Basisschaden.
languages.original_text: If an enemy {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parries{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}blocks{/g} the user's attack, the user's next attack against that enemy cannot be dodged, parried, or blocked and deals +{uip|Damage|d631acbb9e10424c88f2974f7c075207} base damage.

traits.locale_text: Wenn ein Gegner dem Angriff des Nutzers {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}ausweicht{/g}, ihn {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}pariert{/g} oder {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}blockt{/g}, kann der nächste Angriff des Nutzers auf diesen Gegner nicht pariert oder geblockt und ihm kann nicht ausgewichen werden. Ferner verursacht er +{uip|Damage|d631acbb9e10424c88f2974f7c075207} Basisschaden.

languages.text: Si l'attaque de l'utilisateur est {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquivée{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parée{/g} ou {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}bloquée{/g}, son attaque suivante contre le même ennemi ne peut pas être esquivée, parée ou bloquée et inflige +{uip|Damage|d631acbb9e10424c88f2974f7c075207} points de dégâts de base.
languages.original_text: If an enemy {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parries{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}blocks{/g} the user's attack, the user's next attack against that enemy cannot be dodged, parried, or blocked and deals +{uip|Damage|d631acbb9e10424c88f2974f7c075207} base damage.

traits.locale_text: Si l'attaque de l'utilisateur est {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquivée{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parée{/g} ou {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}bloquée{/g}, son attaque suivante contre le même ennemi ne peut pas être esquivée, parée ou bloquée et inflige +{uip|Damage|d631acbb9e10424c88f2974f7c075207} points de dégâts de base.

languages.text: Bir düşman, kullanıcının saldırısına karşı {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}kaçınma{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}savuşturma{/g} veya {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}bloklama{/g} yaparsa kullanıcının o düşmana yapacağı bir sonraki saldırıya karşı kaçınma, savuşturma veya bloklama yapılamaz ve saldırı +{uip|Damage|d631acbb9e10424c88f2974f7c075207} taban hasar verir.
languages.original_text: If an enemy {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parries{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}blocks{/g} the user's attack, the user's next attack against that enemy cannot be dodged, parried, or blocked and deals +{uip|Damage|d631acbb9e10424c88f2974f7c075207} base damage.

traits.locale_text: Bir düşman, kullanıcının saldırısına karşı {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}kaçınma{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}savuşturma{/g} veya {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}bloklama{/g} yaparsa kullanıcının o düşmana yapacağı bir sonraki saldırıya karşı kaçınma, savuşturma veya bloklama yapılamaz ve saldırı +{uip|Damage|d631acbb9e10424c88f2974f7c075207} taban hasar verir.

languages.text: 敌人若{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:Parry}招架{/g}或{g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}格挡{/g}了使用者的攻击，使用者对其进行的下一次攻击便无法被闪避、招架或格挡，且额外造成{uip|Damage|d631acbb9e10424c88f2974f7c075207}点基础伤害。
languages.original_text: If an enemy {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parries{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}blocks{/g} the user's attack, the user's next attack against that enemy cannot be dodged, parried, or blocked and deals +{uip|Damage|d631acbb9e10424c88f2974f7c075207} base damage.

traits.locale_text: 敌人若{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:Parry}招架{/g}或{g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}格挡{/g}了使用者的攻击，使用者对其进行的下一次攻击便无法被闪避、招架或格挡，且额外造成{uip|Damage|d631acbb9e10424c88f2974f7c075207}点基础伤害。

languages.text: 敵が攻撃を{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}回避{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:Parry}防御{/g}、または{g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}ブロック{/g}した場合、次の攻撃は回避、防御、またはブロックされず、+{uip|Damage|d631acbb9e10424c88f2974f7c075207}の基礎ダメージを与える。
languages.original_text: If an enemy {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parries{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}blocks{/g} the user's attack, the user's next attack against that enemy cannot be dodged, parried, or blocked and deals +{uip|Damage|d631acbb9e10424c88f2974f7c075207} base damage.

traits.locale_text: 敵が攻撃を{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}回避{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:Parry}防御{/g}、または{g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}ブロック{/g}した場合、次の攻撃は回避、防御、またはブロックされず、+{uip|Damage|d631acbb9e10424c88f2974f7c075207}の基礎ダメージを与える。
